chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1172 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of bail application ---------------------------- 06.07.2022 Mr. Muneer Ahmed, advocate for applicant Ms. Rubina Qadir, Additional P.G. -------------------------------- Irshad Ali Shah J.— It is alleged that on arrest from the applicant was secured 1110 grams of charas, for that the present case was registered. On having been refused post-arrest bail by learned Sessions Judge Malir, Karachi he has sought for the same from this Court by way of instant criminal bail application under section 497 Cr. PC. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant being innocent has been involved in this case falsely by the police; it is borderline case and he is in custody for more than two months without effective progress in trial of his case, therefore, he is entitled to be released on bail on point of further inquiry. Learned DPG for the State has opposed to release of the applicant on bail by contending that offence which he has committed is affecting the society at large. Heard argument. Perused record. There is no independent witness to the incident. The applicant is having no criminal record. The case has finally been challaned and there is no apprehension of tampering with the evidence on the part of the applicant. In these circumstances, the case for release of the applicant on bail on the point of further inquiry obviously is made out. In view of above, the applicant is admitted to bail, subject to his furnishing surety in sum of Rs.50,000/- and P. R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trial court.
R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trial court. The instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
